mapper.sql: id, system_code, system_name, owner_department_id, default_auth_mode, default_timeout_seconds, default_retry_count, status, created_at, updated_at

s.id, s.system_id, sys.system_code, sys.system_name, sys.owner_department_id, s.service_code, s.service_name, s.purpose, s.service_type, s.endpoint, s.http_method, s.auth_mode, s.timeout_seconds, s.retry_count, s.response_success_rule, s.enabled, s.created_at, s.updated_at
mapper.select: select from downstream_service_config s join downstream_system_config sys on s.system_id = sys.id where s.id = #{id}
select from downstream_service_config s join downstream_system_config sys on s.system_id = sys.id where s.service_code = #{serviceCode}
mapper.update: update downstream_system_config set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update downstream_service_config set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
